title: Equipment Hider
description: An all-in-one solution to hide every type of equipment that you can wear!
body:
## Equipment Hider An all-in-one solution to hide every type of equipment that you can wear! ![readme.md preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/526afe228a9a5316d3f1c3e80a4cbf1f90b2897f.png) Image taken in 1.12.2 but newer versions have the same functionality. ## What is this? It's a resource pack that sets the rendered model of various items invisible. ## What does it hide? - Armors (Leather, Chain, Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite) - Elytra - Turtle Helmet - Pumpkin head with overlay (Coming soon) ## Why? I used different texture packs for hiding the armor and the elytra on my skin, but these packs weren't updated in-time or stuck in a lower game version. So I wanted to solve it with one smart solution that hide everything. ## Changelog 1st March 2025 - Backport for 1.6.1-1.8.9 and 1.11-1.12.2 versions.
16th February 2025 - New icon for the project. Will be changed in future versions of the resource pack.
